title: Surgeon Vacancy at Torrent Pharmaceuticals Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Torrent Pharmaceuticals Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Torrent Pharmaceuticals Consulting Pvt Ltd are looking for an experienced Surgeon based out of Kolkata. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Torrent Pharmaceuticals Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Torrent Pharmaceuticals Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Wound Care

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Torrent Pharmaceuticals Consulting Pvt Ltd!
